goal: Separate default Knowledge seed ownership from similarity logic and keep Import parsing heuristics in the shared parser.

steps.name: knowledge-seed-ownership
steps.summary: Default seed data moved to knowledgeSeedCases.ts and similarity now requires caller-supplied Knowledge cases.

steps.name: import-parser-ownership
steps.summary: Import header and boundary heuristics now live in DEFAULT_IMPORT_PARSER_PROFILE; Home no longer has a second parser path.

steps.name: regression-and-browser-verification
steps.summary: Automated checks passed and dev server returned HTTP 200, but in-app Browser control failed before click-through E2E.
